title: ImageGenerationMetadata
description: Validation schema for metadata outputs generated by the sga-17-image-generator skill.

status.description: Operational status of the image generator tool execution.

file_path.description: Absolute system path where the generated PNG/JPG image was successfully saved.

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio requested for the target platform.

style.description: Visual style archetype selected to match the brand guide.

optimized_prompt.description: The enriched and prompt-engineered instruction sent to the generation engine.

engine_used.description: Identifies which tool performed the rendering execution.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 formatted datetime indicating when the generation succeeded.
